Sandbox_PhobosLib_EnableDebugLogging_too:
Enables verbose debug logging for the Phobos Shared Library to the game console (Lua debug output).

WARNING: This is a DEVELOPER AND TROUBLESHOOTING tool.

-Produces large amounts of console output;
-May cause minor performance degradation;
-Useful for diagnosing mod conflicts, recipe issues, or reporting bugs;
-Independent of PZ's -debug launch flag (works even without it).

-OFF (default): Normal operation. Only startup and error messages logged.
-ON: Verbose logging. All PhobosLib internal operations logged to console.

Leave OFF unless actively troubleshooting. Requires a game restart to take effect.
